name: Host-Touched Penitent
description: A Penitent Engine the Host has overgrown. The cult-monks seal themselves in machine to deny the rot any flesh to take, yet this one kneels broken, black-gold veined thin through the gaps in its plating, bone-thorns pushing through and a shattered halo above a cracked vox-grille. Slow, heavier than any raider, and not a thing the roads believed could happen.
